company_type: Insurance - Supplemental Health and Life Insurance

dependencies: Third-party vendors for business support services and functions
Information technology systems and third-party providers
Distribution partners including Japan Post Group, Dai-ichi Life, Daido Life
Asset managers for investment sourcing and management
risks: Vendor operations outside the U.S. subject to political and military events
Dependence on third-party vendors for IT systems and business operations
Limited control over third-party vendor information systems and networks
Dependence on third-party technology service providers for critical IT infrastructure and policy administration systems
Disruption risk from vendor cybersecurity incidents or system failures
Risk of vendor failure to deliver contracted services

regulatory_risks: Policyholder protection requirements in Japan (LIPPC)
U.S. federal and state tax law changes affecting insurance operations
Guaranty fund assessments in U.S. states
Japan Financial Services Agency (FSA) regulatory oversight and solvency margin requirements
Compliance with insurance guaranty association laws across 50 U.S. states plus Puerto Rico and District of Columbia
State guaranty association laws
Extensive regulation by Financial Services Agency (FSA) in Japan
Investment Advisers Act of 1940 for asset management subsidiaries
U.S. state insurance regulatory changes and guaranty fund assessments
Bermuda Insurance Act and Bermuda Monetary Authority regulation for Aflac Re
Securities and Exchange Commission disclosure and reporting requirements
Cybersecurity regulations from NIST, CISA, NAIC Model Bulletin on AI
Japan solvency standards including Solvency Margin Ratio (SMR) and Insurance Capital Standards (ICS)
Potential changes to international tax regulations affecting cross-border operations
State insurance regulation in the U.S. by Nebraska Department of Insurance and New York State Department of Financial Services
Privacy regulations including GLBA, HIPAA, APPI (Japan), CCPA, CPRA, UK GDPR, UK DPA, state privacy laws
Climate change-related regulatory changes
NAIC Risk-Based Capital requirements and modernization initiatives
Companies Act of Japan governing dividend distributions
Worker classification regulations and potential misclassification claims
Bermuda Insurance Act compliance for Aflac Re (Bermuda Solvency Capital Requirement)
Changes in Japanese insurance regulations and solvency requirements (Economic Solvency Ratio framework to be introduced in 2025)
Dodd-Frank Wall Street Reform and Consumer Protection Act
Risk-based capital (RBC) requirements for U.S. insurance entities
Changes in tax laws in U.S. and Japan
Federal Insurance Office (FIO) monitoring
Japan Financial Instruments and Exchange Act for AAMJ
Patient Protection and Affordable Care Act (ACA) federal health care reform
NAIC statutory accounting practice changes

sanction_risks: Trade restrictions driven by security concerns
Impact of armed conflicts in Ukraine and Middle East on commodity prices and market volatility
Trade tariffs and retaliatory tariffs from new U.S. administration policies
